fact: Memory module refinement pass applied: moved Memory lower in sidebar, removed Path field from metadata strip, removed unnecessary subtitles, changed active-state styling to higher-contrast teal, added Back to top button.

Search product architecture confirmed: Memory = browse/read memory + search inside memory files, Files = browse + preview + later embedded file search for non-memory content, standalone Search page = temporary bridge only to be retired after embedded file search exists in Files.
Product boundary confirmed: Files must remain non-memory; memory search belongs in Memory, not in Files.
Product posture confirmed: Mission Control remains preview/build shell until Chat path is production-usable; existing Gateway Chat UI remains the real working chat surface for now.

Chat readiness rule: do not treat Mission Control as default daily-driver chat until embedded/live chat path is reliably reachable, honest about auth/boundary conditions, and genuinely improves the experience.
